text.title: Traceability Auto-Maintenance — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: configure-connectors
step.action: Wire SoR connectors; verify joins on IDs.

step.name: nightly-build
step.action: Pull data; build node + edge graph; persist with schema_version + refresh_at.

step.name: alert
step.action: Route broken-link alerts to named owners with SLA.

step.name: persist
step.action: Persist all artefacts for audit; rotate older than 90 days.
